summary: Iteration 132: Tested MyRewardsPage 'See Full List' dialog and Admin permission restrictions. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: MyRewardsPage.jsx: RewardsFullListDialog component correctly implemented with data-testid attributes
REWARDS_CREDIT_TABLE contains 11 earning actions as specified
Dialog shows Action, Category, Points, USDT Value columns correctly
Achievement Badges section displays earned/locked status with lock icons
'1 Point = $0.01 USDT' text shown at bottom of dialog
Sidebar.jsx: masterAdminItems correctly contains only System Check (restricted to isMasterAdmin())
superAdminItems correctly contains Transactions and Rewards Admin (shown for isSuperAdmin() || isMasterAdmin())
Profile dropdown Platform Settings, API Center, Licenses correctly restricted to isMasterAdmin()
seed_data_creation: Reset password for super_admin user hello@hyperdrivemg.co to 'admin123'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 132 tested: (1) MyRewardsPage 'See Full List' dialog - opens from Badges & Achievements card, shows 11 earning actions in table with Action/Category/Points/USDT Value columns, Achievement Badges section with earned/locked status, '1 Point = $0.01 USDT' text at bottom. (2) Admin permissions - Master Admin (iam@ryansalvador.com) sees all admin items including System Check + Platform Settings/API Center/Licenses in profile dropdown. Super Admin (hello@hyperdrivemg.co) correctly does NOT see System Check, Platform Settings, API Center, Licenses. Super Admin correctly sees Members, Trading Signals, Team Analytics, Transactions, Rewards Admin.

see_full_list_button.location: Top-right of Badges & Achievements card header
